# FetchKit

> Scaffolding as a Service for developers and AI agents.

FetchKit provides instant, production-ready project scaffolding — brand kits, legal documents, SEO configs, and security hardening. Free, open source, no sign-up required.

## Services

### Brand Kit (`@fetchkit/brand`)
Generate complete brand identities: logos (30+ variations), favicons (SVG/ICO/PNG), color palettes (24 templates with WCAG contrast), design tokens (CSS/Tailwind/JSON), social cards, letterheads, app icons, email signatures, and brand guidelines.

### Legal Docs (`@fetchkit/legal`)
Generate legal documents: privacy policies, terms of service, cookie consent banners, disclaimers, acceptable use policies, and DMCA notices. Supports GDPR/CCPA sections. Output in Markdown and HTML.

### SEO Config (`@fetchkit/seo`)
Generate SEO artifacts: HTML meta tags, XML sitemaps, robots.txt, and Schema.org JSON-LD structured data. Configurable for any site.

### Security (`@fetchkit/security`)
Generate security configs: CSP headers, CORS policies, auth scaffolds (JWT/session), rate limiting, input validation, and security headers. Supports Express and Next.js frameworks.

## API Access

Base URL: https://fetchkit.dev/api

### Brand API
- `GET /api/brand/generate?name={name}` — Generate logo variations
- `POST /api/brand/regenerate` — Regenerate with locked overrides
- `POST /api/brand/export-svg` — Export production SVG
- `GET /api/brand/favicon?iconId={id}` — Generate favicon bundle
- `POST /api/brand/design-tokens` — Generate CSS/Tailwind/JSON tokens
- `GET /api/brand/icons/search?query={q}` — Search Iconify icons
- `POST /api/brand/palette/generate` — Palette from seed color
- `GET /api/brand/palette/from-name?name={name}` — Palette from brand name
- `POST /api/brand/placeholder` — SVG placeholder images

### Legal API
- `POST /api/legal/generate` — Generate a single legal document
- `POST /api/legal/bundle` — Generate multiple legal documents
- `GET /api/legal/types` — List available document types

### SEO API
- `POST /api/seo/generate` — Generate a single SEO artifact
- `POST /api/seo/bundle` — Generate multiple SEO artifacts
- `GET /api/seo/types` — List available artifact types

### Security API
- `POST /api/security/generate` — Generate a single security config
- `POST /api/security/bundle` — Generate multiple security configs
- `GET /api/security/types` — List available artifact types and frameworks

## MCP Server

Install: `npx @fetchkit/mcp`

17 tools available for brand, legal, SEO, and security scaffolding. Uses stdio transport. Configure in your MCP client:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "fetchkit": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["@fetchkit/mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

## CLI

Install: `npx @fetchkit/cli init`

Generates all scaffolding files (brand, legal, SEO, security) into a `fetchkit-output/` directory.

## npm Packages

- `@fetchkit/brand` — Brand identity generation
- `@fetchkit/legal` — Legal document generation
- `@fetchkit/seo` — SEO artifact generation
- `@fetchkit/security` — Security config generation
- `@fetchkit/mcp` — MCP server (17 tools)
- `@fetchkit/cli` — CLI scaffolding tool

## Links

- Website: https://fetchkit.dev
- Docs: https://fetchkit.dev/docs
- API Spec: https://fetchkit.dev/api/openapi.json
- GitHub: https://github.com/smccart/fetchkit
